data.title: RED: Write failing test for AcliClient.get_issue_link_types()
data.description:
## Testing Mode
RED

## Description
Write a failing unit test for a new AcliClient.get_issue_link_types() instance method that wraps the ACLI Go binary to query Jira's available issue link types.

## Test Approach
Given: A mock ACLI Go binary that returns JSON with link types (e.g., [{id: 10003, name: "Relates", inward: "relates to", outward: "relates to"}])
When: acli_client.get_issue_link_types() is called
Then: Returns a parsed list of dicts with at least 'id' and 'name' fields

Given: ACLI Go returns an error (non-zero exit)
When: get_issue_link_types() is called
Then: Raises subprocess.CalledProcessError (consistent with existing AcliClient error pattern)

## File Impact
- tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py (Edit: add test class/functions for get_issue_link_types)

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] Test file contains test functions for get_issue_link_types() happy path and error path
  Verify: grep -q "get_issue_link_types" tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py
- [ ] Tests fail when run (RED state — method does not exist yet)
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py -k "get_issue_link_types" --tb=short -q 2>&1 | grep -q "FAILED\|ERROR"
- [ ] No existing tests broken
  Verify: poetry run pytest tests/scripts/test_bridge_outbound.py --ignore-glob="*link_type*" --tb=short -q
